response.justification: Bogdan Szabo's extensive software engineering background and experience with performance optimization, system architecture, and hardware-software co-design are valuable, but his resume lacks direct experience with AI accelerators, deep-learning workload optimization, SoC/IP modeling, or GPU architecture—core requirements for this Principal Performance Architect role. His expertise leans heavily toward web, mobile, and embedded systems, with no clear evidence of work in cloud infrastructure for AI hardware or performance analysis of deep-learning workloads.
strengths: Strong background in performance optimization and system architecture design
Experience with hardware-software co-design and embedded systems development
Proven track record in building scalable, high-performance software systems (e.g., GISCollective, MCP frameworks)
concerns: No demonstrated experience with AI accelerators, deep-learning workloads, or GPU architecture
Lacks required qualifications such as PhD or equivalent experience in a relevant field (education is a Bachelor's in CS and another in Fine Arts)
Resume does not mention SoC/IP modeling, performance bottlenecks in AI workloads, or AI accelerator optimization

key_factors.factor: Relevant technical experience in AI accelerators and deep-learning workloads
Experience with SoC/IP modeling and hardware-software co-design
